subject: Doublade, the Royal Sword Pokemon — Ghost/Steel-type consisting of two animated swords with faces, floating with a chain connecting them
description: Two animated swords float together against a hazy purple and blue background with faint dark silhouettes of trees or thorns in the distance. Each sword has a small face-like marking visible on the blade. A chain or cord visibly links the two swords together. The blades are silver-grey with pink-red scabbard or guard elements and decorative markings. The overall scene feels ghostly and atmospheric, with the swords hovering in a misty void-like environment. The composition centers both swords occupying roughly equal space.
foreground: two animated swords with face markings, linked by chain, pink-red guard accents
background: misty purple-blue void with faint dark silhouettes
